descriptions: Kinfolk are rivals of the Bandidos.
edges.evidence_quote: the Mongols the Kinfolk , and the Vagos

descriptions: Kinfolk member murdered Bandidos president, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Javier Gonzalez, vice-president of the Kinfolk's El Paso chapter, was sentenced to fifty-six years in prison in January 2019 after he was convicted of murdering Bandidos El Paso chapter president Juan "Compa" Martinez Jr.

descriptions: Nicholas Femia was an enforcer for the East Boston Gang and later a bodyguard for Winter Hill Gang leaders, indicating a cooperative relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: Femia was an enforcer for Joseph Barboza's East Boston Gang

descriptions: Montreal Hells Angels conspired with Cali Cartel and Rizzuto crime family to smuggle cocaine.
edges.evidence_quote: Pierre Rodrigue and David Rouleau, two Canadian Hells Angels from the Sherbrooke chapter, were arrested by British police in London at the request of the Royal Canadian Mounted Police (RCMP) in February 1995 before being extradited to Canada and sentenced to fourteen years' imprisonment for conspiring to smuggle 558 kilograms of cocaine into the UK in a scheme also involving the Rizzuto crime family and the Cali Cartel.

descriptions: Montreal chapter shipped cocaine to London chapter.
edges.evidence_quote: The British Hells Angels have a close association with the Canadian Hells Angels, and the Angels' Montreal chapter was involved in shipping cocaine to the Angels' London chapter.

descriptions: Montreal Hells Angels conspired with Rizzuto crime family and Cali Cartel to smuggle cocaine.
edges.evidence_quote: Pierre Rodrigue and David Rouleau, two Canadian Hells Angels from the Sherbrooke chapter, were arrested by British police in London at the request of the Royal Canadian Mounted Police (RCMP) in February 1995 before being extradited to Canada and sentenced to fourteen years' imprisonment for conspiring to smuggle 558 kilograms of cocaine into the UK in a scheme also involving the Rizzuto crime family and the Cali Cartel.

descriptions: Waray-Abuyog Gang has alliances with Sudoy-Sudoy Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: They have also been documented making alliances with other Waray gangs, most notably the Sudoy-Sudoy Gang.

descriptions: Aryan Brotherhood lists Jewish Defense League as an enemy.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Liga de defensa Judía

descriptions: JDL infiltrated Klan groups to gather intelligence.
edges.evidence_quote: A Jewish Defense League (JDL) member, known by the pseudonym "Annette", infiltrated neo-Nazi and Klan groups in 1979; he informed on two dozen Klansmen and neo-Nazis

descriptions: Sin City Deciples is reportedly allied with Dahuru MC.
edges.evidence_quote: The club is reportedly allied with the Dahuru MC and Mixbreed MC.

edges.source: Revolutionary Forces of the G9 Family and Allies
descriptions: Zoe Nation is listed as an ally of G9 in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Zoe Pound , Zoe Nation, Zoe Mafia Family

descriptions: SSMC is part of a coalition with United Klans of America.
edges.evidence_quote: Their club's motto, "The Black & Silver Solution"', is the phrase given to represent a coalition of several racist organizations with the United Klans of America and The Creativity Movement.

edges.target: Original Knights of the Ku Klux Klan
descriptions: Original Knights members joined United Klans, causing dissolution of Original Knights.
edges.evidence_quote: Congressional investigators found that by the end of 1965, most members of the Original Knights had joined Shelton's United Klans, leading to the dissolution of the Original Knights.

descriptions: Ally listed in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Club de Motociclistas Pagano

descriptions: Byrd Gang has a long-standing feud with 3-N-G gang, resulting in violent clashes.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang has feuded with the 3-N-G gang for years, clashing with them during the 2009 Mardi Gras parade where seven people were shot, including a baby.

Pirus.description: The Pirus are a subset of the Bloods gang alliance, founded in 1969 in Compton, California by Sylvester Scott and Vincent Owens. They emerged as rivals to the Crips and are involved in drug trafficking, robbery, extortion, and murder. The gang remains active and influential in Los Angeles street gang culture.

descriptions: Big Circle Gang lists Piru Street Boys as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: 14K Triad, Bloods, Piru Street Boys, Crips, East Side Longos, 211 Crew, Soldiers of Aryan Culture, Aryan Circle, Aryan Brotherhood, Nazi Lowriders, Aryan Nations, Lynwood Vikings

descriptions: Bloods are allied with Pirus.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: People Nation , Norteños (pandilla) , Pirus , United Blood Nation , Juggalos , Trinitarios (organización criminal)

descriptions: Piru Street Boys is the first Bloods set.
edges.evidence_quote: Scott formed the Piru Street Boys, the first 'Bloods' gang.

descriptions: Pirus founded the Bloods alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: The Pirus are therefore considered the founders of the Bloods.

descriptions: Piru Street Boys later feuded and fought with Crips.
edges.evidence_quote: After two years of peace, a feud began between the Pirus and the other Crip sets. It later turned violent as gang warfare ensued between former allies.

descriptions: Piru Street Boys initially associated with Crips as a set.
edges.evidence_quote: By 1971, a gang on Piru Street in Compton, California, known as the Piru Street Boys, formed and associated itself with the Crips as a set.

descriptions: Mob Piru is a set within the Piru gang alliance, which originated from Piru Street Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: The Mob Piru ... is a 'set' of the Piru gang alliance

descriptions: The Pirus allied with the Bishops to oppose the Crips.
edges.evidence_quote: the 300 Playboy Piru Bloods formed an alliance with other smaller street gangs such as the Brims, Bishops and Denver Lanes, which also opposed the Crips.

descriptions: Piru Street Boys formed the Bloods alliance with other gangs.
edges.evidence_quote: by 1972, the Piru Street Boys formed an alliance with other smaller street gangs such as the Brims, Bishops and Denver Lanes, which also opposed the Crips. This alliance became known as the Bloods

descriptions: The Pirus are a subset of the Bloods alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: The Pirus ( / ˈ p aɪ . r uː / ⓘ ) are a subset of the larger Bloods gang alliance

descriptions: The Pirus allied with the Brims to oppose the Crips.
edges.evidence_quote: the 300 Playboy Piru Bloods formed an alliance with other smaller street gangs such as the Brims, Bishops and Denver Lanes, which also opposed the Crips.

descriptions: The Piru Street Boys formed after their founders were attacked by Crips.
edges.evidence_quote: the Piru Street Boys or simply Pirus, was formed by student Sylvester Scott, after he and fellow student Benson Owens were attacked by Washington and other Crips.

descriptions: The Pirus formed as a rival to the Crips.
edges.evidence_quote: A group of young African Americans from Compton and nearby areas felt threatened by the Crips' dominance. They refused to submit, and eventually formed their own gang as the main rival to the Crips.

descriptions: Piru Street Boys were initially associated with the Crips but later fell out.
edges.evidence_quote: the Piru Street Boys were initially associated with the Crips, but later had a falling out

descriptions: The Pirus allied with the Denver Lanes to oppose the Crips.
edges.evidence_quote: the 300 Playboy Piru Bloods formed an alliance with other smaller street gangs such as the Brims, Bishops and Denver Lanes, which also opposed the Crips.

descriptions: Pirus is listed as an ally of Sex Money Murder in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: United Blood Nation, Pirus, MS13(Localized Alliances)

Comando Vermelho.description: One of the two largest criminal organizations in Brazil, founded in 1979 at the Cândido Mendes prison on Ilha Grande, Rio de Janeiro. It originated from the Falange Vermelha and was created by Rogério Lemgruber. The group is heavily involved in drug trafficking and operates in multiple Brazilian states and several South American countries. It is designated as a terrorist organization by Argentina, Paraguay, and the United States.

descriptions: ADA and Comando Vermelho are rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang's main rivals are Comando Vermelho and Terceiro Comando Puro.

descriptions: The infobox lists Comando Vermelho as a rival of ADA.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: Terceiro Comando Puro , Comando Vermelho

descriptions: Amigos dos Amigos originated from a expelled member of Comando Vermelho.
edges.evidence_quote: It began in 1998 when a member of § Comando Vermelho was expelled from the organization for ordering the assassination of another member.

descriptions: Bala na Cara formed an alliance with Comando Vermelho for drug trafficking and other illicit activities.
edges.evidence_quote: Nos últimos anos, a Bala na Cara estreitou laços com o Comando Vermelho (CV) , uma das maiores organizações criminosas do Brasil, estabelecendo um vínculo de aliança no tráfico de drogas e em outras atividades ilícitas.

descriptions: Bonde do Maluco considers Comando Vermelho a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Its rivals include the Comando Vermelho (CV)

descriptions: Bonde do Maluco has Comando Vermelho as a rival in Salvador.
edges.evidence_quote: Tem como rivais o Comando Vermelho (CV) e a Katiara dentro da capital baiana

descriptions: Bonde dos 13 is in conflict with Comando Vermelho.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: CV

descriptions: In 2019, Bonde dos 40 entered a war with Comando Vermelho.
edges.evidence_quote: It was also reported that same year that it entered into a war with Comando Vermelho to dominate the Vila Conceição neighborhood in southern São Luís.

descriptions: B40 and CV are rivals for territory in São Luís.
edges.evidence_quote: Desde 2019 , o B40 tem o domínio aproximado de 80% da capital maranhense, enquanto outros 20% são do rival Comando Vermelho

descriptions: CV is listed as a rival of B40 in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: PCC , CV

descriptions: Bonde dos 40 formed an alliance with Comando Vermelho.
edges.evidence_quote: forming alliances with Comando Vermelho (CV) and Amigos dos Amigos (ADA).

descriptions: CCA broke away from Comando Vermelho, indicating a split.
edges.evidence_quote: rompendo com o Comando Vermelho e formando uma aliança com o PCC

descriptions: CCA and PCC fought against CV in a prison rebellion.
edges.evidence_quote: Em julho de 2019, uma rebelião ... O confronto foi entre membros do CCA/PCC e o CV.

descriptions: Comando Vermelho has fought in conflicts with ADA.
edges.evidence_quote: It has fought in several small-scale conflicts with rival gangs such as ... Amigos dos Amigos (ADA)

descriptions: Infobox lists Bala na Cara as an ally of CV.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Primeiro Grupo Catarinense [pt] , Bala na Cara [pt]

descriptions: Infobox lists Bala na Cara as an ally of Comando Vermelho.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Bala na Cara

descriptions: Infobox lists Bonde do Maluco as a rival of CV.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: ... Bonde do Maluco ...

descriptions: Infobox lists Bonde dos 40 as a rival of CV.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: ... Bonde dos 40 ...

descriptions: CV has violently fought with Border Command in the Amazon region.
edges.evidence_quote: the CV, PCC, Familia do Norte, and Colombian militia groups including the Border Command and the Carolina Ramirez Front have violently fought

descriptions: CV has violently fought with Carolina Ramirez Front in the Amazon region.
edges.evidence_quote: the CV, PCC, Familia do Norte, and Colombian militia groups including the Border Command and the Carolina Ramirez Front have violently fought

descriptions: Comando Vermelho Jovem was a dissident faction that was later reincorporated into Comando Vermelho.
edges.evidence_quote: Dela surge ainda uma espécie de dissidência, posteriormente reincorporada, o Comando Vermelho Jovem .

descriptions: Comando Vermelho (Falange Vermelha) and Falange Jacaré were at war.
edges.evidence_quote: duas facções criminosas guerreavam entre si no estado do Rio de Janeiro; Falange Vermelha e Falange Jacaré.

descriptions: CV has violently fought with Familia do Norte in the Amazon region.
edges.evidence_quote: the CV, PCC, Familia do Norte, and Colombian militia groups including the Border Command and the Carolina Ramirez Front have violently fought

descriptions: Comando Vermelho had an alliance with Família do Norte that was broken in 2019.
edges.evidence_quote: O Comando Vermelho historicamente tinha uma aliança com a facção Família do Norte , que foi rompida em 2019.

descriptions: Infobox lists Guardiões do Estado as a rival of CV.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: ... Guardiões do Estado ...

descriptions: Infobox lists Massa Carcerária as a rival of CV.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: ... Massa Carcerária [pt] ...

descriptions: Infobox lists Okaida as a rival of CV.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: ... Okaida [pt]

descriptions: Comando Vermelho has fought in conflicts with PCC.
edges.evidence_quote: It has fought in several small-scale conflicts with rival gangs such as Primeiro Comando da Capital (PCC)

descriptions: A 20-year truce between CV and PCC broke down in 2016, leading to violent clashes.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2016, a 20-year truce between the Primeiro Comando da Capital (PCC), a rival organization based in São Paulo, and the CV broke down, sparking violent clashes.

descriptions: CV and PCC were in conflict, with the war starting in 2016.
edges.evidence_quote: Between 2015 and 2018, the Familia do Norte and the Comando Vermelho (CV) formed an alliance to prevent the advance of the Primeiro Comando da Capital (PCC) in Amazonas, generating the War between the PCC and CV in 2016

descriptions: Comando Vermelho is in turf wars with Primeiro Comando da Capital.
edges.evidence_quote: turf wars against rival criminal organizations, such as § Primeiro Comando da Capital

descriptions: Infobox lists Primeiro Comando da Capital as a rival of Comando Vermelho.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: Primeiro Comando da Capital

descriptions: CV and PCC had a truce that lasted 20 years until 2016.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2016, a 20-year truce between the Primeiro Comando da Capital (PCC), a rival organization based in São Paulo, and the CV broke down

descriptions: The text states they are the two largest criminal organizations in Brazil, but does not assert a cooperative or conflictual relationship between them; they are simply co-mentioned as major groups.
edges.evidence_quote: Comando Vermelho Rogério Lemgruber ( CVRL ), mais conhecido como Comando Vermelho ( CV ), é uma das duas maiores organizações criminosas do Brasil , ao lado do Primeiro Comando da Capital (PCC).

descriptions: Infobox lists Primeiro Grupo Catarinense as an ally of CV.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Primeiro Grupo Catarinense [pt] , Bala na Cara [pt]

descriptions: Infobox lists Primeiro Grupo Catarinense as an ally of Comando Vermelho.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Primeiro Grupo Catarinense

descriptions: CV established a working relationship with FARC, exchanging arms for cocaine.
edges.evidence_quote: After Pablo Escobar's death, the CV established a working relationship with the FARC, a Colombian guerrilla group which moved into the cocaine trade.

descriptions: CV had business dealings with FARC through leader Fernandinho Beira-Mar.
edges.evidence_quote: Beira-Mar is an imprisoned senior leader who led the CV's business dealings with the FARC

descriptions: Comando Vermelho has fought in conflicts with TC, which splintered from CV.
edges.evidence_quote: It has fought in several small-scale conflicts with rival gangs such as ... Terceiro Comando (TC), the latter itself the result of a power struggle between Comando Vermelho leaders in the mid-1980s.

descriptions: Comando Vermelho has fought in conflicts with TC, which originated from a split within CV.
edges.evidence_quote: It has fought in several small-scale conflicts with rival gangs such as ... Terceiro Comando (TC), the latter itself the result of a power struggle between Comando Vermelho leaders in the mid-1980s.

descriptions: Infobox lists Terceiro Comando Puro as a rival of CV.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Primeiro Comando da Capital , Terceiro Comando Puro , Amigos dos Amigos , Police militias , Família do Norte , Guardiões do Estado , Bonde do Maluco , Bonde dos 40 , Massa Carcerária [pt] , Okaida [pt]

descriptions: Comando Vermelho is in turf wars with Terceiro Comando Puro.
edges.evidence_quote: turf wars against rival criminal organizations, such as § ... § Terceiro Comando Puro

descriptions: Infobox lists Terceiro Comando Puro as a rival of Comando Vermelho.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: Terceiro Comando Puro

descriptions: After 2018, FDN and CV became enemies, engaging in conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2018, the alliance dissolved, generating a confrontation between the CV and Familia do Norte

descriptions: CV took territories from FDN in 2020, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Em fevereiro de 2020, a facção carioca Comando Vermelho tomou vários territórios da FDN e dominando vários bairros de Manaus .

descriptions: FDN and CV were allied from 2015 to 2018 against PCC.
edges.evidence_quote: Between 2015 and 2018, the Familia do Norte and the Comando Vermelho (CV) formed an alliance to prevent the advance of the Primeiro Comando da Capital (PCC) in Amazonas

descriptions: FDN and CV were allies against PCC in 2016.
edges.evidence_quote: Cerca de um ano após a FDN declarar guerra contra o PCC com o apoio do CV, o grupo pôs em prática o plano de acabar com o PCC no Amazonas, em outubro de 2016.

descriptions: FDN and CV broke their alliance in 2018.
edges.evidence_quote: A Família do Norte teve a união quebrada com o Comando Vermelho em 2018, por motivos pessoais.

descriptions: Família Terror do Amapá lists Comando Vermelho as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: Comando Vermelho , UCA

descriptions: Guardiões do Estado is a rival of Comando Vermelho.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Comando Vermelho , Família do Norte , Massa Carcerária [ pt ]

descriptions: GDE lost the title of largest faction to CV, indicating rivalry.
edges.evidence_quote: A G.D.E. foi a segunda maior facção do estado do Ceará nas ruas e no presídio, perdendo o título de maior do estado para o Comando Vermelho

descriptions: CV listed as rival of GDE in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: CV , PCC , Massa Carcerária

descriptions: GDE and CV fought over drug sales points.
edges.evidence_quote: A disputa por pontos de venda de drogas entre G.D.E e Comando Vermelho estaria por trás de uma 'escalada da tensão'

descriptions: GDE cooperated with CV and PCC in joint attacks in 2019.
edges.evidence_quote: Ao lado de integrantes do Comando Vermelho e do Primeiro Comando da Capital , membros da GDE praticaram mais de 400 ações criminosas

descriptions: GDE had a peace pact with CV that was later broken.
edges.evidence_quote: A facção também teria mantido um pacto de paz com o Comando Vermelho , que também foi quebrado

descriptions: Liga da Justiça is rival with CV.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: CV

descriptions: Massa Carcerária and Comando Vermelho were formerly allies but are now in a violent conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: A decisão provocou uma sangrenta guerra entre os antigos aliados, sobretudo, em regiões como a Grande Messejana e Caucaia.

descriptions: CV is listed as a rival of Os Manos in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: CV , V7 , Os Tauras , BNC , Os Aberto , Cebolas , CNG

descriptions: PCC and CV had a truce that broke down in 2016, leading to conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2016, the breakdown of a 20-year truce between the PCC and the Red Command (CV) led to a massive uptick in violence across Brazil

descriptions: PCC e CV estão em lados opostos em um conflito que começou em 2016.
edges.evidence_quote: O conflito entre facções criminosas brasileiras de 2016–2020 foram uma série de confrontos entre organizações criminosas do país divididas em dois lados em fins da década de 2010. Os confrontos têm sido encabeçados por Primeiro Comando da Capital (PCC) e Comando Vermelho (CV), em lados opostos

descriptions: PCC and CV were allies under Geleião and Cesinha.
edges.evidence_quote: The PCC was led by "Geleião" and "Cesinha", who were responsible for an alliance with another criminal organization, Rio de Janeiro's Red Command (CV).

descriptions: PCC e CV foram aliados sob a liderança de Geleião e Cesinha.
edges.evidence_quote: responsáveis pela aliança do grupo com a facção criminosa Comando Vermelho (CV), do Rio de Janeiro.

descriptions: PCC and Comando Vermelho were both designated as narcoterrorist organizations by Argentina, but no direct relationship between them is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2025, the Government of Argentina, led by Javier Milei, declared the Primeiro Comando da Capital (PCC) and Comando Vermelho (CV) as narcoterrorist organizations.

descriptions: O PCC foi considerado a primeira máfia do Brasil, e o CV tornou-se a maior facção.
edges.evidence_quote: Com isso, o Comando Vermelho (CV) assumiu o posto de maior facção do país.

descriptions: Primeiro Comando Puro sought alliances with Comando Vermelho.
edges.evidence_quote: seeking alliances with the CV

descriptions: PGC is allied with Comando Vermelho.
edges.evidence_quote: It is known for their alliance with § Comando Vermelho

descriptions: PGC allied with Comando Vermelho for information exchange and training in weapons handling and crime sophistication.
edges.evidence_quote: A principal delas foi com o Comando Vermelho, liderado pelo narcotraficante Fernandinho Beira-Mar, a quem coube, além de trocas de informações, o aperfeiçoamento dos recrutados pelo PGC no manuseio de armas e de fuzis e a sofisticação no modus operandi dos crimes.

descriptions: RDA is a splinter group of CV.
edges.evidence_quote: some leaving to join a CV splinter group known as "Revolucionarios do Amazonas" (Revolutionaries of Amazonas; RDA)

descriptions: Santa Cruz Cartel is allied with Comando Vermelho.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Medellín Cartel , Comando Vermelho

edges.source: Sindicato do Crime do Rio Grande do Norte
descriptions: CV is listed as a rival of Sindicato in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: PCC , CV

descriptions: Terceiro Comando fought conflicts with Comando Vermelho in 2001 and 2004.
edges.evidence_quote: The Terceiro Comando has fought several small-scale conflicts (in 2001 and 2004) with the rival gang Comando Vermelho.

descriptions: Terceiro Comando was created to oppose Comando Vermelho.
edges.evidence_quote: surgida para se opor ao Comando Vermelho em 1988

descriptions: Terceiro Comando was a break-away faction of Comando Vermelho.
edges.evidence_quote: founded in the early 1980s as a break-away faction of the § Red Command

descriptions: Terceiro Comando was formed as a splinter group from Comando Vermelho.
edges.evidence_quote: It was founded in the early 1980s and is a break-away faction of the Comando Vermelho.

descriptions: TCP operates against Comando Vermelho.
edges.evidence_quote: The faction continues to operate against the Comando Vermelho in regions outside Rio de Janeiro

descriptions: TCP tem o CV como rival declarado.
edges.evidence_quote: Comando Vermelho (rival declarado)

descriptions: TCP atua contra o CV em vários estados.
edges.evidence_quote: O Terceiro Comando Puro mantém sua atuação contra o Comando Vermelho (CV) fora do Rio de Janeiro

descriptions: El infobox lista al Comando Vermelho como enemigo del Tren de Aragua.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Comando Vermelho

descriptions: Comando Vermelho is listed as an ally of Tren de Aragua in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Primeiro Comando da Capital , Comando Vermelho , La Empresa , La Linea , La Unión Tepito , Jalisco New Generation Cartel , Los Tiguerones (from November 2023) , Los Lobos

Clan Sarno.description: Camorra clan based in Naples, Italy, formed in the early 1980s by the Sarno brothers (Ciro, Vincenzo, Luciano, Giuseppe, Pasquale). It emerged after the dissolution of the Nuova Famiglia and engaged in conflicts with the Alleanza di Secondigliano and the De Luca Bossa clan. The clan later allied with the Mazzarella and Misso families to form a dominant cartel in Naples.

descriptions: The Aprea-Cuccaro clan opposed the Sarno clan.
edges.evidence_quote: The goal was to resist the pressure exerted by the Mazzarella clan and the Sarno clan.

descriptions: Giovanni Aprea worked for the Sarno clan early in his career.
edges.evidence_quote: Giovanni Aprea, known as ' e curtiello , a leading figure of the clan, began the criminal career working for Ciro Sarno , then a powerful boss of the Sarno clan from Ponticelli.

descriptions: The Sarno clan is a subgroup of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: The Camorra's organizational structure is divided into individual groups called 'clans'.

descriptions: De Luca Bossa was hostile to the cartel formed by Fusco-Ponticelli and Sarno.
edges.evidence_quote: Il clan De Luca Bossa fu ostile al cartello formato dai clan Fusco-Ponticelli e Sarno.

descriptions: De Luca Bossa clan fought a bloody war against the Sarno clan.
edges.evidence_quote: The clan was founded by Antonio De Luca Bossa... and was famous for the bloody war against the once powerful Sarno clan.

descriptions: The De Luca Bossa clan fought a war with the Sarno clan over territory.
edges.evidence_quote: In the early 90s, Antonio became a trusted member of the Sarno clan, however, he decided to create his own clan, which ended in a bloody war between the then newly created clan and the Sarnos for the control of the territory.

descriptions: Fabbrocino planned to expand into the eastern zone of Naples taking advantage of the Sarno clan's decline.
edges.evidence_quote: i Fabbrocino avevano anche in progetto di estendere i propri tentacoli sino alla Zona orientale di Napoli , approfittando della debacle del clan Sarno di Ponticelli

descriptions: Splinter groups of Clan Sarno supported Clan Marfella against Clan Lago.
edges.evidence_quote: dagli scissionisti del clan Sarno di Ponticelli

descriptions: Mazzarella clan allied with Misso and Sarno clans in the Misso-Mazzarella-Sarno alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: In the late 1980s the Mazzarellas formed a strong alliance with the Misso and Sarno clans, called Misso-Mazzarella-Sarno, to oppose to the rising power of the Secondigliano Alliance

descriptions: Mazzarella absorbed Sarno into a cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel corso degli anni la famiglia di Vincenzo Mazzarella ha inglobato altri clan come i Misso e i Sarno formando così uno dei cartelli più influenti dell'epoca: i Misso-Mazzarella-Sarno

descriptions: Misso gathered the bosses of Mazzarella and Sarno clans around his group for a revenge project.
edges.evidence_quote: Misso avrebbe raccolto intorno al proprio gruppo i capiclan dei Mazzarella e dei Sarno

descriptions: Ricci group is allied with Sarno clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Nei Quartieri Spagnoli, in seguito alla caduta dei clan Di Biasi e Russo, è emerso il gruppo dei Ricci, facente capo al pregiudicato Enrico Ricci, ex commerciante, ed ai suoi due figli, alleati dei Sarno di Ponticelli.

descriptions: Clan Sarno had a significant alliance with the Amato-Pagano clan.
edges.evidence_quote: tessere una tela molto importante con gli Amato-Pagano

descriptions: Clan Sarno was at war with the Anastasio family.
edges.evidence_quote: entrarono in guerra con le famiglie locali: i Veneruso, gli Anastasio e i Panico

descriptions: The Arlistico-Terracciano-Orefice clan was considered part of the Sarno clan structure.
edges.evidence_quote: Luisa Terracciano (48), ritenuta la reggente del clan Arlistico-Terracciano-Orefice , smantellando così di fatto il clan Sarno

descriptions: Clan Sarno was in conflict with the De Luca Bossa clan.
edges.evidence_quote: contro il clan De Luca Bossa

descriptions: The Sarno clan (allied with Misso) fought against the De Luca Bossa clan (part of Alleanza di Secondigliano).
edges.evidence_quote: faida tra i Sarno e i De Luca Bossa : questa faida può essere considerata come una sorta di "spin-off" della faida tra i Misso e l' Alleanza di Secondigliano , essendo i primi alleati dei Sarno e i secondi inglobati nell'Alleanza

descriptions: Clan Sarno later went to war with the Mazzarella clan over territory.
edges.evidence_quote: una guerra per il controllo delle attività illecite nel quartiere Mercato con i clan Mazzarella

descriptions: Clan Sarno allied with Mazzarella and Misso to form a cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: si unì successivamente alle famiglie Mazzarella e Misso formando il cartello criminale cosiddetto: Misso-Mazzarella-Sarno

descriptions: Clan Sarno allied with Misso and Mazzarella to form a cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: si unì successivamente alle famiglie Mazzarella e Misso formando il cartello criminale cosiddetto: Misso-Mazzarella-Sarno

descriptions: Clan Sarno was at war with the Panico family.
edges.evidence_quote: entrarono in guerra con le famiglie locali: i Veneruso, gli Anastasio e i Panico

descriptions: Clan Sarno allied with the Ricci clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Le alleanze dei Sarno compresero il clan Ricci sui Quartieri Spagnoli

descriptions: Clan Sarno emerged after the threat of NCO ended.
edges.evidence_quote: non essendoci più la minaccia della Nuova Camorra Organizzata di Raffaele Cutolo

descriptions: Mazzarella and Sarno clans had clear reasons of hatred towards the Alleanza di Secondigliano.
edges.evidence_quote: che avevano chiare ragioni di odio nei confronti dell' Alleanza di Secondigliano

descriptions: Clan Sarno was at war with the Alleanza di Secondigliano.
edges.evidence_quote: entrò prima in guerra con i clan dell' Alleanza di Secondigliano

descriptions: Clan Sarno was at war with the Veneruso family.
edges.evidence_quote: entrarono in guerra con le famiglie locali: i Veneruso, gli Anastasio e i Panico

descriptions: Ciro Sarno, former NCO member, founded the Sarno clan after NCO's decline.
edges.evidence_quote: Ciro Sarno (Napoli, 25 marzo 1958), unitosi, dopo il declino della NCO, ai clan della Nuova Famiglia, diede vita, con i fratelli, al clan Sarno

Banda della Comasina.description: Italian criminal group active in the 1970s in robberies, kidnappings, and weapons trafficking in the Comasina area of northern Milan. Controlled by Renato Vallanzasca, it was often at odds with the Turatello Crew. The group's most famous action was the kidnapping of Emanuela Trapani. It was active until 1987.

descriptions: The Banda della Comasina was often in conflict with the Turatello Crew.
edges.evidence_quote: it was often at odds with the band of Francis Turatello

descriptions: Turatello Crew and Banda della Comasina were initially in a gang war, then later formed an alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: The Turatello Crew and Banda della Comasina had been in the middle of a gang war with each other when their leaders, Vallanzasca and Turatello, were incarcerated in the same prison, reconciling and bonding there. The newly forged alliance between the two crime groups only increased their influence and power in the Milan underworld.

descriptions: After a gang war, the two groups formed an alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: The Turatello Crew and Banda della Comasina had been in the middle of a gang war with each other when their leaders, Vallanzasca and Turatello, were incarcerated in the same prison, reconciling and bonding there. The newly forged alliance between the two crime groups only increased their influence and power in the Milan underworld.

descriptions: The HPG is the armed wing of the PKK.
edges.evidence_quote: The PKK had an armed wing, originally formed in 1984 as the Kurdistan Freedom Brigades... renamed to the People's Liberation Army of Kurdistan... and again renamed to the People's Defence Forces (HPG) in 1999.

descriptions: San Donà di Piave cartel was involved with Mala del Brenta; Maritan became capo under Maniero after rivalry.
edges.evidence_quote: The San Donà di Piave cartel, under the leadership of Silvano Maritan, nicknamed "The President", protégé of the confined Cosa Nostra boss Salvatore Contorno, the rivalry with another cartel based in the same area caused a number of violent confrontations and subsequently placed Maritan as capo of the eastern part of the province of Venice, that is until he gave up a percentage of his assets to Maniero.

descriptions: Los Charlines are allied with the Corleonesi clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Medellin Cartel , Cali Cartel , Clan del Golfo , Corleonesi clan , Nuova Camorra Organizzata , Sinaloa Cartel

descriptions: Iconoclasta Sect is a cell of ITS that claimed a bomb in Athens.
edges.evidence_quote: The "Iconoclasta Sect" claimed responsibility for the attack

'Ndrina La Maggiore.description: A powerful 'ndrina (clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in San Luca, Calabria, Italy. Active since the late 19th century, it is considered one of the most influential 'ndrine of all time. The clan is involved in drug trafficking, particularly heroin and cocaine, and has ties to other 'Ndrangheta families. It has been implicated in historical events such as the kidnapping of Aldo Moro.

descriptions: Nirta helped De Stefano establish peace.
edges.evidence_quote: Orazio De Stefano riesce a ristabilire la pax mafiosa grazie all'intervento della cosca "amica" dei Nirta (La Maggiore) di San Luca.

descriptions: La Maggiore is allied with the Codispoti and has familial ties.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati dei Codispoti (con cui hanno dei legami parentali)

descriptions: La Maggiore is allied with the Giorgi.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati dei Codispoti (con cui hanno dei legami parentali), dei Vottari , detti Frunzu e cioè i Pelle , dei Giorgi e dei Romeo .

descriptions: La Maggiore (Nirta Scalzone) was involved with Mammoliti in the Locale di Aosta.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 23 gennaio 2019 in Valle d'Aosta vengono arrestate 16 persone ... riconducibili ai Nirta Scalzone, ai Raso e ai Mammoliti

descriptions: After 1995, the Nirta versu allied with La Maggiore (Scalzone).
edges.evidence_quote: Invece si alleano con i Scalzone gli Strangio , detti janchi, e quelli detti barbari , i Giorgi detti boviciano , e i Nirta versu .

descriptions: La Maggiore is allied with the Vottari (also known as Frunzu or Pelle).
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati dei Codispoti (con cui hanno dei legami parentali), dei Vottari , detti Frunzu e cioè i Pelle , dei Giorgi e dei Romeo .

descriptions: Giuseppe Vottari, a member of Pelle 'ndrina, is allied with the Nirta clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Giuseppe Vottari, known as "U massaru" or "capobastone", allied with the Nirta clan since the early seventies.

descriptions: La Maggiore is allied with the Romeo.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati dei Codispoti (con cui hanno dei legami parentali), dei Vottari , detti Frunzu e cioè i Pelle , dei Giorgi e dei Romeo .

descriptions: After 1995, the Strangio allied with La Maggiore (Scalzone).
edges.evidence_quote: Invece si alleano con i Scalzone gli Strangio , detti janchi, e quelli detti barbari , i Giorgi detti boviciano , e i Nirta versu .

descriptions: Nirta helped broker peace involving Condello-Rosmini-Imerti.
edges.evidence_quote: La pax mafiosa è stata raggiunta solo con l'intervento di ... dalla cosca dei Nirta (La Maggiore) di San Luca

descriptions: La Maggiore (Nirta Scalzone) was involved with Raso in the Locale di Aosta.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 23 gennaio 2019 in Valle d'Aosta vengono arrestate 16 persone ... riconducibili ai Nirta Scalzone, ai Raso e ai Mammoliti

descriptions: Romeo is allied with Nirta.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati con le cosche dei Nirta ( La Maggiore ) e dei Pelle .

descriptions: Suspected of involvement in ship sinkings together with the Nirta (La Maggiore).
edges.evidence_quote: I Nirta-Strangio sono sospettati di aver avuto a che fare con gli affondamenti di navi ... insieme ... ai Nirta (La Maggiore)

descriptions: Headie One and RV, prominent OFB members, were originally in Star Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: They were both originally rappers in Star Gang, a road rap group from the 2000s and an offshoot group from the Tottenham Mandem gang.

descriptions: OFB was preceded by Star Gang, which was an offshoot from TMD.
edges.evidence_quote: OFB (Original Farm Boys) is the current gang associated with the Broadwater Farm Estate. They were preceded by Star Gang, a road rap group from the 2000s, an offshoot group from TMD which consisted of Headz (now known as Headie One) and Young RV (now known as RV), who later became prominent in the UK drill scene and formed part of the UK drill collective OFB.

descriptions: Members of Star Gang formed part of OFB.
edges.evidence_quote: Two members of Star Gang, Headz (now known as Headie One ) and Young RV (now known as RV ), later became prominent in the UK drill scene and formed part of the UK drill collective OFB (Original Farm Boys).

descriptions: Star Gang is an offshoot of Tottenham Mandem.
edges.evidence_quote: They were both originally rappers in Star Gang, a road rap group from the 2000s and an offshoot group from the Tottenham Mandem gang.

descriptions: Star Gang was created by older TMD members.
edges.evidence_quote: 'Star Gang' was also formed during this period, created by older members of TMD.

descriptions: Older TMD members used the name Star Gang, indicating a splinter or rebranding.
edges.evidence_quote: whereas some older members began to use the name 'Star Gang'

descriptions: Hai San absorbed the Wah Sang society around 1854.
edges.evidence_quote: Bolton et al. suggest that the Hai San society ... by around 1854 had absorbed the Wah Sang society

descriptions: Huỳnh Tỳ's triad initiated Năm Cam into the criminal underworld.
edges.evidence_quote: Văn Cam was first initiated into the criminal underworld by Huỳnh Tỳ, a major player in the triads of Saigon at the time.

descriptions: Wanted Bikers were affiliated to Bandidos but sought to switch to Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: In June 1991, the clubhouse of the Wanted Bikers, a club in Haute-Savoie affiliated to the Bandidos but wishing to instead begin an association with the Hells Angels, was shot at and the motorcycles parked outside were destroyed.

Tehreek-e-Taliban Pakistan.description: Deobandi jihadist militant organization primarily operating along the Afghanistan-Pakistan border. Founded by Baitullah Mehsud in 2007, it seeks to overthrow the Pakistani government and establish an Islamic state. Known for suicide bombings, sectarian violence, and attacks on security forces. Designated as a terrorist group by the UN and several countries.

descriptions: Pakistani Taliban is a non-state ally of al-Qaeda.
edges.evidence_quote: Pakistani Taliban

descriptions: ISIS–K has links with Tehrik-e-Taliban Pakistan.
edges.evidence_quote: ISIS-K maintains opportunities link with dissatisfied members of Afghan Taliban and Tehrik-e-Taliban Pakistan.

descriptions: ISIS–K split from the Tehreek-i-Taliban Pakistan.
edges.evidence_quote: Split from: Tehreek-i-Taliban Pakistan

descriptions: The Pakistani Taliban is listed as a denied ally of the Taliban.
edges.evidence_quote: Non-state allies ... Pakistani Taliban (denied)

descriptions: Tehreek-e-Taliban Pakistan pledged allegiance to the Taliban government.
edges.evidence_quote: Many designated terror groups have pledged their allegiance to the new Taliban government, these groups include: Al-Qaeda , al Shabaab , Boko Haram , Jama'at Nasr al-Islam wal-Muslimin and Turkistan Islamic Party , Tehreek-e-Taliban Pakistan , Harkat-ul-Mujahideen .

descriptions: TTP sent fighters to Syria to fight alongside Ahrar al-Sham.
edges.evidence_quote: the TTP's media wing ... claimed to have ... sent hundreds of fighters to Syria to fight alongside ... Ahrar al-Sham

descriptions: Ahrar-ul-Hind splintered from TTP in 2014.
edges.evidence_quote: a group of TTP terrorists under the lead of Maulana Umar Qasmi broke away from the organization to form the Ahrar-ul-Hind

descriptions: TTP sent fighters to Syria to fight alongside Al-Nusra Front.
edges.evidence_quote: the TTP's media wing ... claimed to have ... sent hundreds of fighters to Syria to fight alongside ... the Al-Nusra Front

descriptions: TTP receives ideological guidance from and maintains ties with al-Qaeda.
edges.evidence_quote: The TTP receives ideological guidance from and maintains ties with al-Qaeda

descriptions: TTP has close ties to al-Qaeda, sharing resources and personnel.
edges.evidence_quote: Tehreek-e-Taliban Pakistan has close ties to al-Qaeda, sharing money and bomb experts and makers.

descriptions: TTP sent fighters to Syria to fight alongside Ansar al-Tawhid.
edges.evidence_quote: the TTP's media wing ... claimed to have ... sent hundreds of fighters to Syria to fight alongside ... Ansar al-Tawhid

descriptions: BLA is listed as an ally of TTP in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Balochistan Liberation Army

descriptions: Ghazi Brigade worked closely with TTP in 2009, jointly planning attacks.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2009 the Ghazi Brigade worked closely with the TTP during military operations in the Swat Valley, and the two groups jointly planned attacks on western targets in Islamabad.

descriptions: Hafiz Gul Bahadur Group is listed as part of TTP's group in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Group: ... Hafiz Gul Bahadur Group

descriptions: TTP allegedly killed a Haqqani network member in retaliation for the network's alleged role in Mehsud's death.
edges.evidence_quote: Some Sources also claim that TTP was behind the death of Nasiruddin Haqqani because TTP believed that Haqqani Network was behind the death of Hakimullah Mehsud as they disclosed whereabouts of Hakimullah Mehsud to US military in Afghanistan.

descriptions: Harakat-e-Inqilab-e-Islami is listed as part of TTP's group in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Group: ... Harakat-e-Inqilab-e-Islami

descriptions: HuJI is believed to have a supportive relationship with TTP.
edges.evidence_quote: Individuals and groups that are believed to have a supportive relationship with the TTP include: - Harkat-ul Jihad Islami (HuJI), an al-Qaeda-linked terror group

descriptions: Hizb-ul-Ahrar merged with TTP in 2020.
edges.evidence_quote: Hizb-ul-Ahrar merged with TTP

descriptions: IMU is listed as an ally of TTP in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Al-Qaeda IMU (pro Al-Qaeda factions only)

descriptions: TTP and IMU have a long history of collaboration, including joint operations.
edges.evidence_quote: The TTP and the Islamic Movement of Uzbekistan (IMU) have a long history of collaboration.

descriptions: TTP and IMU jointly carried out the 2014 Jinnah International Airport attack.
edges.evidence_quote: The TTP claimed responsibility for the 2014 Jinnah International Airport attack, which was carried out jointly with the Islamic Movement of Uzbekistan.

descriptions: Some TTP members have been affiliated with IS-KP.
edges.evidence_quote: Some TTP members have also been affiliated with the Islamic State – Khorasan Province

descriptions: Some TTP members are affiliated with ISIS-K.
edges.evidence_quote: Some TTP members have also been affiliated with the Islamic State – Khorasan Province.

descriptions: Some TTP members have been affiliated with ISIS-K.
edges.evidence_quote: Some TTP members have also been affiliated with the Islamic State – Khorasan Province.

descriptions: Some TTP members changed allegiance to ISIS-K, indicating a structural shift.
edges.evidence_quote: Once they pledged allegiance to ISIS-K, they claimed that they were there to fight Afghan Taliban and Pakistan.

descriptions: Jaish-e-Fursan-e-Muhammad is listed as part of TTP's group in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Group: ... Jaish-e-Fursan-e-Muhammad

descriptions: Jamaat-ul-Ahrar merged with TTP in 2020.
edges.evidence_quote: Jamaat-ul-Ahrar ... merged with TTP

descriptions: TTP bombed a mosque run by Lashkar-e-Islam.
edges.evidence_quote: The TTP Khyber Agency faction claimed responsibility for a 23 March 2012 bombing that targeted a mosque, run by Lashkar-e-Islam (LeI), in Kolay village of Tirah Valley.

descriptions: Lashkar-e-Islam is listed as part of TTP's group in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Group: ... Lashkar-e-Islam

descriptions: A faction of Lashkar-e-Jhangvi merged with TTP in 2020.
edges.evidence_quote: the Amjad Farouqi group, one faction of the Lashkar-e-Jhangvi, ... merged with TTP

descriptions: One faction of Lashkar-e-Jhangvi merged with TTP in 2020.
edges.evidence_quote: Between July and November 2020, the Amjad Farouqi group, one faction of the Lashkar-e-Jhangvi, the Musa Shaheed Karwan group, Mehsud factions of the TTP, Mohmand Taliban, Bajaur Taliban, Jamaat-ul-Ahrar, and Hizb-ul-Ahrar merged with TTP.

descriptions: Naeem Bukhari group is listed as part of TTP's group in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Group: ... Naeem Bukhari group

descriptions: TTP leaders formed the SIM alliance with other factions.
edges.evidence_quote: Baitullah Mehsud, Hafiz Gul Bahadur, and Maulavi Nazir agreed in February and formed the Shura Ittehadul Mujahideen (SIM)

descriptions: Afghan Taliban attacked a TTP base, resulting in deaths of TTP commanders.
edges.evidence_quote: On 10 October 2013, heavily armed Afghan Taliban attacked a Pakistani Taliban base in Kunar province of Afghanistan.

descriptions: Afghan Taliban and TTP clashed in Kunar province.
edges.evidence_quote: Again on 25 June 2016, Afghan Talibans and TTP clashed with each other in the Kunar province of Afghanistan.

descriptions: TTP has pledged allegiance to and fought alongside the Taliban.
edges.evidence_quote: The TTP has publicly pledged allegiance to and fought alongside the Taliban

descriptions: TTP pledged allegiance to and fought alongside the Afghan Taliban, but operates independently.
edges.evidence_quote: The TTP has publicly pledged allegiance to and fought alongside the Taliban, which has governed Afghanistan since 2021, but it operates independently and does not share the Taliban's command structure.

descriptions: Punjabi Taliban developed strong connections with both TTP and Afghan Taliban, implying a cooperative relationship between TTP and Afghan Taliban.
edges.evidence_quote: The Punjabi Taliban reportedly developed strong connections with the TTP, the Afghan Taliban, Tehreek-e-Nafaz-e-Shariat-e-Mohammadi and various other groups based in the North West Frontier Province (NWFP) and the Federally Administered Tribal Areas (FATA).

descriptions: TTP pledges allegiance to and fights alongside the Taliban.
edges.evidence_quote: The TTP has publicly pledged allegiance to and fought alongside the Taliban, which has governed Afghanistan since 2021, but it operates independently and does not share the Taliban's command structure.

descriptions: TTP has pledged allegiance to and fought alongside the Taliban, but operates independently.
edges.evidence_quote: The TTP has publicly pledged allegiance to and fought alongside the Taliban, which has governed Afghanistan since 2021, but it operates independently and does not share the Taliban's command structure.

descriptions: Tariq Gidar Group is listed as part of TTP's group in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Group: ... Tariq Gidar Group

descriptions: Tehreek-e-Jihad Pakistan has been an ally of TTP since 2023.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Tehreek-e-Jihad Pakistan (since 2023)

descriptions: TTP has a symbiotic relationship with TNSM.
edges.evidence_quote: There is clearly a symbiotic relationship between all of these different organizations: Al-Qaeda, the Pakistani Taliban, the Afghan Taliban, TNSM.

descriptions: Punjabi Taliban developed strong connections with both TTP and TNSM, implying a cooperative relationship between TTP and TNSM.
edges.evidence_quote: The Punjabi Taliban reportedly developed strong connections with the TTP, the Afghan Taliban, Tehreek-e-Nafaz-e-Shariat-e-Mohammadi and various other groups based in the North West Frontier Province (NWFP) and the Federally Administered Tribal Areas (FATA).

descriptions: TNSM claimed responsibility for an attack on behalf of TTP.
edges.evidence_quote: The Tehreek-e-Nafaz-e-Shariate-Mohammadi (TNSM) claimed responsibility for a 23 December 2007 suicide bombing targeting a military convoy on behalf of the TTP.

descriptions: TNSM is listed as part of TTP's group in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Group: ... TNSM

descriptions: Hardline elements splintered to form Jamaat-ul-Ahrar in 2014.
edges.evidence_quote: hardline elements of the TTP from four of the seven tribal districts formed a separate group called Tehreek-e-Taliban Pakistan Jamaat-ul-Ahrar

descriptions: Mehsud faction broke away to form Tehreek-e-Taliban South Waziristan in 2014.
edges.evidence_quote: the Mehsud faction of the TTP defected from the main group to form a breakaway unit called Tehreek-e-Taliban South Waziristan

descriptions: The Vallelunga and Turrà were opposed to the Nardo and their allies in the Faida dei boschi.
edges.evidence_quote: alleati dei Turrà, contrapporsi allo schieramento formato dagli Emanuele di Mongiana (intesi strazzi), agli Emanuele di Santa Caterina, ai Ciconte di Serra San Bruno e ai Nardo di Soriano

South Pacific Cartel.description: Mexican organized crime group formed from remnants of the Beltrán-Leyva Cartel, based in Morelos. Founded in April 2010 by Héctor Beltrán Leyva. Known for employing a 12-year-old gunman. Significantly less active since mid-2011 after leaders were captured.

descriptions: The South Pacific Cartel was a short-lived cell created by Héctor Beltrán Leyva as part of the organization.
edges.evidence_quote: In April 2010, Héctor Beltrán Leyva created a short-lived cell or branch in Morelos state called South Pacific Cartel (Cártel del Pacífico Sur) best known for having employed a 12-year-old gunman and executioner.

descriptions: South Pacific Cartel formed from the breakup of Beltrán-Leyva Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: the Beltrán-Leyva Cartel, the organization broke apart into smaller factions: the South Pacific Cartel

descriptions: Pacific Sur Cartel was a short-lived branch of Beltrán-Leyva Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: En abril de 2010, Héctor Beltrán Leyva creó una célula o rama de corta duración en el estado de Morelos llamada Cártel del Pacífico Sur

descriptions: Guerreros Unidos initiated a dispute with Cartel del Pacífico Sur.
edges.evidence_quote: Finalmente en 2011, El Tilde funda Guerreros Unidos e inicia una disputa con otros cárteles emergentes del extinto Cártel de los Beltrán Leyva conocidos como el Cartel del Pacífico Sur, La Mano con Ojos y Los Rojos, organizaciones que desaparecieron posteriormente.

descriptions: Infobox lists Beltrán-Leyva Cartel as an ally of South Pacific Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Beltrán-Leyva Cartel

descriptions: South Pacific Cartel is composed of remnants of Beltrán-Leyva Cartel, indicating a structural successor relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: The South Pacific Cartel ... is a Mexican organized crime group composed of the remnants of the Beltrán-Leyva Cartel.

descriptions: Infobox lists Gulf Cartel as a rival of South Pacific Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Sinaloa Cartel , Gulf Cartel

descriptions: Infobox lists Los Mazatlecos as an ally of South Pacific Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Beltrán-Leyva Cartel , Los Zetas , Los Mazatlecos

descriptions: Infobox lists Los Zetas as an ally of South Pacific Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Beltrán-Leyva Cartel , Los Zetas , Los Mazatlecos

descriptions: Infobox lists Sinaloa Cartel as a rival of South Pacific Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Sinaloa Cartel , Gulf Cartel

Cowboy Mafia.description: The Cowboy Mafia was a nickname for a group of marijuana smugglers operating in the United States during the 1970s. Based in Texas, they imported over 106 tons of marijuana from Colombia using shrimp boats. The group was arrested in 1978 and 26 members were convicted in 1979. Rex Cauble, considered the headman, was sentenced to 95 years.

descriptions: The Outlaws are affiliated with the Menard Brotherhood.
edges.evidence_quote: The Outlaws are also affiliated with the Menard Brotherhood, a "prison biker gang" operating in the Illinois state prison system

descriptions: Piromalli-Molé fought a feud with Ventre-Carlino in the 1950s.
edges.evidence_quote: The Piromalli-Molé clan was involved in a bloody feud with the Ventre-Carlino clan in the 1950s
